ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performs the track */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in minutes and seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicate if the track contains explicit content */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the audio file for the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* User ratings for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist or band */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre the artist typically performs */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the artist */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "formation_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicate if the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "privacy" INTEGER /* Indicate if the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicate if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the playlist image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that contains the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that is included in the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, artist, regular) */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listened_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played by the user */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time of the last play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-genre association */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicate if the genre is the primary genre for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
